'''[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] Niko Smith''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who was assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Vengeance Battle Group|battle group]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], he was a member of a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] led by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Zonka]].
